overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a red-haired character in a dark coat walking through a narrow mountain canyon at night. The scene features dramatic rocky cliff faces, grassy trailside vegetation, and a moody blue sky with scattered clouds and visible stars.

events.description: camera tilts upward to reveal cliff tops and starry night sky

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the canyon while looking up at the rock formations and sky

entered.detail: tall steep rock wall with layered stone texture forming the canyon side
tall steep rock wall with grassy ledges forming the opposite canyon side
narrow dirt trail winding through the canyon floor
tall green grass growing along the left edge of the path
tall green grass growing along the right edge of the path
snow-capped or rocky mountain peak visible through the canyon gap
dark blue night sky with scattered white clouds and visible stars

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow mountain canyon at night, flanked by steep rocky cliff faces on both sides. The camera tilts upward to reveal the starry sky above the canyon walls as the character continues along the dirt path surrounded by tall grass.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow canyon with distant mountain vista

events.description: game UI text overlay appears briefly indicating quest tracking functionality

agents.ego_description: continuing steadily along the canyon path toward the distant mountain gap

segments.scene_description: The character maintains a steady walking pace through the continuing canyon trail, with the same rocky cliff walls and vegetation lining the path. A brief UI text overlay appears at the bottom of the screen providing game instructions about quest tracking.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a narrow mountain canyon at night, shifting from a focused view of the trail to a wide perspective of the celestial sky. It begins with the character walking along a dirt path flanked by steep rocky cliff faces and tall grass. As the character progresses, the camera tilts upward to reveal a moody blue sky filled with scattered clouds and visible stars above the canyon walls. The scene then returns to the steady forward motion of the character through the continuing rocky corridor, while a brief UI text overlay regarding quest tracking appears at the bottom of the screen.
